Risk: low (additive, gate-verified, negative tests added). Rollback: git revert of the loop-1 changes.

summary: ADG 1.0 Loop 2 (consolidation + audit integrity): installer now ships the single policy source + validator + governed toggle + audit recorder/chain to hosts with merge-aware update (preserves host governed toggles, never carries a relaxed always-on forward, --force-policy re-baselines); --client codex/both added and the Codex adapter host-hook path + a symlink isMain bug fixed; append-only audit log now carries a rolling hash chain (shared canonicalizer, forward-only, single appendFileSync) where edit/delete/reorder/insert in the chained region is a hard FAIL; doctor controls-drift check (relaxed always-on or unaudited disable = FAIL); read-only control_state MCP tool; broadened destructive coverage (chmod -R 000) + Bash-branch policy-write guard; --quiet gate validators.
details: Design-reviewed before build (RFC 9162 / research.swtch tlog / GoLogX for the chain). Judge panel: 7 units, 3 opus judges each, refute-by-default, 20/21 approve (the 1 reject was a token-delta lens on a non-token security unit; majority shipped it), 0 weakensInvariant. This event is the chain anchor (prevHash = GENESIS). Measured: guardrail-check 107->15 quiet tokens, validate-audit 67->14. Reason: complete the 1.0 consolidation and audit-integrity axes. Risk: low (additive, gate-verified, negative tests). Rollback: git revert of the loop-2 changes. Deferred (tracked): external git tip-anchor to close hash-chain tail-truncation.

summary: ADG 1.0.0 release. Three self-converging ultra-loops took ADG 0.9.1 to 1.0: (L1) toggleable controls as policy-as-code with always-on pins + governed audited toggle, hardened deterministic hook closing 5 real bypasses, evals driving the real hook + injection/propagation/toggle-abuse scenarios, MCP TOON default + structured outputs, prefix-stable context packet, and the governance alignment assessment (OWASP LLM Top 10 / ISO 42001 / Three Lines / ISO 31000); (L2) append-only audit rolling hash chain + high-water-mark sidecar, one-install consolidation shipping a single policy source to the Claude and Codex adapters with merge-aware update, doctor controls-drift, read-only control_state MCP tool, broadened destructive coverage, --quiet validators; (L3) version 1.0.0 across the full surface, AGENTS.md + regenerated CLAUDE.md, README, release notes, the governance-controls release class (live-evidence-required), and a read-only dashboard controls view.
details: Each loop: research swarm + adversarial gap/design-review swarm + build + odd-judge panel (refute-by-default, distinct lenses) + green ci:governance + consolidated audit event + completeness critic. Judge totals across loops: 21/21 (L1), 20/21 (L2), 14/15 (L3) approve, 0 weakensInvariant in any loop. Deny-by-default and the append-only audit log were strengthened, never weakened; toggling a control is a governed, audited action; always-on controls (destructive deny, audit append-only, forbidden-bulk read) are pinned in code. Measured token deltas: MCP context packet 5048->1386 (-73%/call); agent:evals stdout 1337->94 (-93%); guardrail-check --quiet 107->15; validate-audit --quiet 67->14. No em dashes in generated output. Reason: ADG 1.0 GA. Risk: low (additive, gate-verified, negative tests throughout, 3 independent judge panels). Rollback: git revert to 0.9.1. Deferred post-1.0 (documented in release notes): audit-chain external git tip-anchor, context cachePrefix + broker pagination.

summary: Skills/plugins updated for 1.1 tooling + added context-bound swarm skills. (1) Five existing skills now reference the new deliverable-quality tooling so agents reach for it proactively: adg-quick-ui-fix (run asset:lint on image assets), adg-signoff-reviewer + agentic-traceability + adg-evidence-curator (release-class:visual + live rendered-artifact evidence + completeness-critic), adg-feature-elicitation (check uncovered-intent gaps). (2) Three new orchestration skills encode a context-bound, backlog-logged swarm to cut tokens: adg-backlog-decompose (Opus/Sonnet planner logs small items), adg-item-worker (Sonnet/Haiku works one item under its bounded packet), adg-backlog-swarm (parent orchestrates, keeps integration + audit log).
details: Skills are playbooks over existing ADG primitives (backlog lifecycle, agent:loop worklist, context:item, write-scope); no new runtime. Measured token basis for the swarm: one item packet is 1353 est tokens (TOON) vs 5048 for the whole-feature monolith, and workers do not accumulate sibling context. skills:validate green (19 skills), all under maxSkillBytes 5000, no forbidden terms. Reason: friend-agent feedback (agents should use the new gates) + cut token usage further. Risk: low (skills are advisory prompts; deterministic gates unchanged). Rollback: git revert the skill changes + remove the 3 manifest entries.

summary: ADG_WRITE_SCOPE hardening converged after 13 adversarial judge rounds (rounds 5-13 beyond the first 9 bypasses). Closed write channels: download/move/compress output flags (curl -o/-O, wget -O and bare, gzip family, sort and shuf -o, uniq output positional); embedded shell-expansion targets now fail closed; compile/link/crypto/doc output flags (cc/gcc/clang/go/ld/objcopy/rollup/babel/pandoc/rustc -o, openssl -out, --out long flags); in-place rewriters (prettier/eslint/stylelint/gofmt/clang-format/autopep8/yapf/biome/black/isort/rustfmt/ruff) with per-tool read-only-mode and per-group value-flag handling; sed -i multi-file; perl and ruby -ne loops; deno eval; bash -c and sh -c; pipe into a bare shell; NotebookEdit notebook_path. Fixed over-blocks: grep with a build-tool search term plus -o, git stash list/show and merge/rebase --abort, separated value-flag values mis-read as paths. Documented residual: program-that-writes (node build.js, make), niche in-place data processors (yq, jq), obfuscated interpreter code. Final judges returned NO ESCAPE FOUND and NO OVER-BLOCK FOUND.
evidence: test-adg-write-scope 220/220 (Claude hook + Codex adapter); test-adg-guardrail-hook 61/61; test-adg-codex-hook 8/8; ci:governance exit 0; round-13 escape judge NO ESCAPE FOUND; round-12 over-block judge clean across 53 verified commands
